src/data/tests.ts:export const getShortResult = (testType: TestType, scores: Record<string, number>): string => {
src/data/tests.ts:  const testInfo = TESTS[testType];
src/data/tests.ts:  const testTitle = testInfo ? testInfo.title.replace('Tes ', '') : testType;
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:  switch (testType) {
src/data/tests.ts:    case 'subject_interest': {
src/data/tests.ts:      const selected = Object.keys(scores).filter(k => scores[k] > 0);
src/data/tests.ts:      return `Minat Mapel: ${selected.length} Pelajaran`;
src/data/tests.ts:    }
src/data/tests.ts:    case 'learning_style': {
src/data/tests.ts:      const maxLs = Object.entries(scores).reduce((a, b) => a[1] > b[1] ? a : b);
src/data/tests.ts:      const map: Record<string, string> = { visual: 'Visual', auditory: 'Auditori', kinesthetic: 'Kinestetik' };
src/data/tests.ts:      return `Gaya Belajar: ${map[maxLs[0]] || maxLs[0]}`;
src/data/tests.ts:    }
src/data/tests.ts:    case 'multiple_intelligences': {
src/data/tests.ts:      const sortedMi = Object.entries(scores).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
src/data/tests.ts:      const top3 = sortedMi.slice(0, 3).map(([key]) => {
src/data/tests.ts:        const map: Record<string, string> = {
src/data/tests.ts:          linguistic: "Linguistik", logical: "Logis", spatial: "Spasial",
src/data/tests.ts:          kinesthetic: "Kinestetik", musical: "Musikal", interpersonal: "Interpersonal",
src/data/tests.ts:          intrapersonal: "Intrapersonal", naturalist: "Naturalis"
src/data/tests.ts:        };
src/data/tests.ts:        return map[key] || key;
src/data/tests.ts:      });
src/data/tests.ts:      return `Kec. Majemuk: ${top3.join(', ')}`;
src/data/tests.ts:    }
src/data/tests.ts:    case 'personality': {
src/data/tests.ts:      const e_i = (scores['extrovert'] || 0) > (scores['introvert'] || 0) ? 'E' : 'I';
src/data/tests.ts:      const s_n = (scores['sensing'] || 0) > (scores['intuition'] || 0) ? 'S' : 'N';
src/data/tests.ts:      const t_f = (scores['thinking'] || 0) > (scores['feeling'] || 0) ? 'T' : 'F';
src/data/tests.ts:      const j_p = (scores['judging'] || 0) > (scores['perceiving'] || 0) ? 'J' : 'P';
src/data/tests.ts:      return `Kepribadian: ${e_i}${s_n}${t_f}${j_p}`;
src/data/tests.ts:    }
src/data/tests.ts:    case 'aptitude_interest': {
src/data/tests.ts:      const sortedRiasec = Object.entries(scores).filter(([k]) => k !== 'none').sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
src/data/tests.ts:      const top3 = sortedRiasec.slice(0, 3).map(([key]) => {
src/data/tests.ts:        const map: Record<string, string> = {
src/data/tests.ts:          realistic: "R", investigative: "I", artistic: "A",
src/data/tests.ts:          social: "S", enterprising: "E", conventional: "C"
src/data/tests.ts:        };
src/data/tests.ts:        return map[key] || key;
src/data/tests.ts:      });
src/data/tests.ts:      return `Bakat Minat: ${top3.join('')}`;
src/data/tests.ts:    }
src/data/tests.ts:    case 'school_major': {
src/data/tests.ts:      const sortedMajors = Object.entries(scores).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
src/data/tests.ts:      const topMajor = sortedMajors[0][0];
src/data/tests.ts:      const map: Record<string, string> = { ipa: "IPA", ips: "IPS", bahasa: "Bahasa", smk: "SMK" };
src/data/tests.ts:      return `Penjurusan: ${map[topMajor] || topMajor}`;
src/data/tests.ts:    }
src/data/tests.ts:    case 'anxiety': {
src/data/tests.ts:      const totalAx = scores['anxiety'] || 0;
src/data/tests.ts:      let level = "";
src/data/tests.ts:      if (totalAx <= 15) level = "Rendah";
src/data/tests.ts:      else if (totalAx <= 45) level = "Sedang";
src/data/tests.ts:      else level = "Tinggi";
src/data/tests.ts:      return `Kecemasan: ${level}`;
src/data/tests.ts:    }
src/data/tests.ts:    case 'cfit': {
src/data/tests.ts:      const totalScore = scores['cfit'] || 0;
src/data/tests.ts:      const estimatedIQ = Math.round((totalScore / 40) * 70 + 70);
src/data/tests.ts:      return `IQ CFIT: ${estimatedIQ}`;
src/data/tests.ts:    }
src/data/tests.ts:    case 'wartegg': {
src/data/tests.ts:      return "Wartegg: Selesai";
src/data/tests.ts:    }
src/data/tests.ts:    default:
src/data/tests.ts:      return `${testTitle}: Selesai`;
src/data/tests.ts:  }
src/data/tests.ts:};
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:export const analyzeResult = (testType: TestType, scores: Record<string, number>) => {
src/data/tests.ts:  switch (testType) {
src/data/tests.ts:    case 'subject_interest': {
src/data/tests.ts:      const selected = Object.entries(scores)
src/data/tests.ts:        .filter(([k, v]) => v > 0)
src/data/tests.ts:        .map(([k]) => {
src/data/tests.ts:          const map: Record<string, string> = {
src/data/tests.ts:            agama: "Pendidikan Agama", ppkn: "PPKn", b_indo: "Bahasa Indonesia",
src/data/tests.ts:            mtk: "Matematika", ipa: "IPA", ips: "IPS", b_ing: "Bahasa Inggris",
src/data/tests.ts:            seni: "Seni Budaya", pjok: "PJOK", prakarya: "Prakarya",
src/data/tests.ts:            informatika: "Informatika", b_daerah: "Bahasa Daerah", bk: "BK"
src/data/tests.ts:          };
src/data/tests.ts:          return map[k] || k;
src/data/tests.ts:        });
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:      return `### Hasil Analisis: Minat Mata Pelajaran
src/data/tests.ts:Anda telah memilih **${selected.length}** mata pelajaran yang Anda sukai:
src/data/tests.ts:${selected.map(s => `- ${s}`).join('\n')}
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:**Interpretasi:**
src/data/tests.ts:Minat terhadap mata pelajaran tertentu menunjukkan kecenderungan bakat dan potensi akademik Anda. Hal ini sangat penting untuk:
src/data/tests.ts:1. **Perencanaan Studi:** Membantu memilih jurusan di jenjang SMA/SMK.
src/data/tests.ts:2. **Pengembangan Diri:** Fokus pada bidang yang paling Anda nikmati agar hasil belajar lebih maksimal.
src/data/tests.ts:3. **Bimbingan Karir:** Memberikan gambaran awal mengenai bidang pekerjaan yang mungkin sesuai di masa depan.
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:**Saran:**
src/data/tests.ts:- Teruslah eksplorasi alasan mengapa Anda menyukai pelajaran tersebut.
src/data/tests.ts:- Diskusikan hasil ini dengan guru mata pelajaran terkait untuk mendapatkan bimbingan lebih lanjut.
src/data/tests.ts:- Gunakan minat ini sebagai motivasi untuk tetap semangat belajar di pelajaran lainnya juga.`;
src/data/tests.ts:    }
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:    case 'learning_style': {
src/data/tests.ts:      const maxLs = Object.entries(scores).reduce((a, b) => a[1] > b[1] ? a : b);
src/data/tests.ts:      if (maxLs[0] === 'visual') {
src/data/tests.ts:        return `### Hasil Analisis: Gaya Belajar Visual
src/data/tests.ts:Anda memiliki kecenderungan belajar secara visual. Ini berarti Anda lebih mudah menyerap informasi melalui penglihatan.
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:**Karakteristik:**
src/data/tests.ts:- Mudah mengingat apa yang dilihat daripada yang didengar.
src/data/tests.ts:- Suka membaca dan memperhatikan detail visual.
src/data/tests.ts:- Membutuhkan gambaran menyeluruh sebelum memahami suatu konsep.
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:**Saran Tindak Lanjut:**
src/data/tests.ts:- Gunakan mind map, diagram, atau grafik saat mencatat.
src/data/tests.ts:- Tandai bagian penting di buku dengan stabilo berwarna.
src/data/tests.ts:- Tonton video pembelajaran atau gunakan flashcard bergambar.`;
src/data/tests.ts:      }
src/data/tests.ts:      if (maxLs[0] === 'auditory') {
src/data/tests.ts:        return `### Hasil Analisis: Gaya Belajar Auditori
src/data/tests.ts:Anda memiliki kecenderungan belajar secara auditori. Ini berarti Anda lebih mudah menyerap informasi melalui pendengaran.
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:**Karakteristik:**
src/data/tests.ts:- Mudah mengingat apa yang didengar dan diucapkan.
src/data/tests.ts:- Suka berdiskusi dan mendengarkan penjelasan lisan.
src/data/tests.ts:- Terkadang mudah terganggu oleh keributan.
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:**Saran Tindak Lanjut:**
src/data/tests.ts:- Rekam penjelasan guru dan dengarkan kembali saat belajar.
src/data/tests.ts:- Belajar kelompok dan diskusikan materi dengan teman.
src/data/tests.ts:- Baca materi pelajaran dengan suara lantang (reading aloud).`;
src/data/tests.ts:      }
src/data/tests.ts:      return `### Hasil Analisis: Gaya Belajar Kinestetik
src/data/tests.ts:Anda memiliki kecenderungan belajar secara kinestetik. Ini berarti Anda lebih mudah menyerap informasi melalui gerakan dan praktik langsung.
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:**Karakteristik:**
src/data/tests.ts:- Belajar lebih baik melalui pengalaman dan aktivitas fisik.
src/data/tests.ts:- Sulit duduk diam dalam waktu lama.
src/data/tests.ts:- Suka menyentuh atau mempraktikkan apa yang dipelajari.
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:**Saran Tindak Lanjut:**
src/data/tests.ts:- Lakukan eksperimen atau simulasi langsung terkait materi.
src/data/tests.ts:- Belajar sambil berjalan-jalan kecil atau menggunakan gerakan tangan.
src/data/tests.ts:- Beristirahat sejenak (jeda) di sela-sela waktu belajar yang panjang.`;
src/data/tests.ts:    }
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:    case 'multiple_intelligences': {
src/data/tests.ts:      const sortedMi = Object.entries(scores).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
src/data/tests.ts:      const topMi = sortedMi[0][0];

src/data/tests.ts:        kinesthetic: "Anda sangat terampil menggunakan tubuh untuk mengekspresikan ide atau menciptakan sesuatu. Anda memiliki koordinasi fisik yang baik.\n\n**Saran:** Ikuti kegiatan olahraga, teater, atau tari. Pelajari keterampilan praktis yang membutuhkan ketangkasan tangan.",

src/data/tests.ts:        interpersonal: "Anda sangat pandai memahami dan berinteraksi dengan orang lain. Anda memiliki empati tinggi dan mampu bekerja sama dalam tim.\n\n**Saran:** Ambil peran kepemimpinan dalam organisasi sekolah. Kembangkan kemampuan komunikasi dan mediasi.",
src/data/tests.ts:        intrapersonal: "Anda memiliki pemahaman yang mendalam tentang diri sendiri, termasuk emosi, tujuan, dan motivasi pribadi. Anda mandiri dan reflektif.\n\n**Saran:** Luangkan waktu untuk refleksi diri dan membuat jurnal. Tetapkan tujuan pribadi yang jelas dan rencanakan langkah pencapaiannya.",
src/data/tests.ts:        naturalist: "Anda memiliki ketertarikan dan kepekaan tinggi terhadap alam, hewan, dan tumbuhan. Anda suka mengamati lingkungan sekitar.\n\n**Saran:** Ikuti kegiatan pecinta alam atau berkebun. Pelajari biologi, ekologi, atau ilmu lingkungan lebih mendalam."

src/data/tests.ts:

src/data/tests.ts:${miDescriptions[topMi] || "Anda memiliki potensi unik di bidang ini."}

src/data/tests.ts:    case 'personality': {
src/data/tests.ts:      const e_i = (scores['extrovert'] || 0) > (scores['introvert'] || 0) ? 'E' : 'I';
src/data/tests.ts:      const s_n = (scores['sensing'] || 0) > (scores['intuition'] || 0) ? 'S' : 'N';
src/data/tests.ts:      const t_f = (scores['thinking'] || 0) > (scores['feeling'] || 0) ? 'T' : 'F';
src/data/tests.ts:      const j_p = (scores['judging'] || 0) > (scores['perceiving'] || 0) ? 'J' : 'P';
src/data/tests.ts:      const mbti = `${e_i}${s_n}${t_f}${j_p}`;
src/data/tests.ts:
src/data/tests.ts:      return `### Hasil Analisis: Tipe Kepribadian ${mbti}

src/data/tests.ts:5.  **Kotak V (Energi & Agresi):** Terkait dengan cara mengatasi ketegangan dan energi psikis dalam bertindak atau menghadapi konflik.

src/data/tests.ts:7.  **Kotak VII (Sensitivitas):** Melambangkan kepekaan, kelembutan, dan erotisme (dalam konteks psikologis berarti kemampuan untuk mencintai atau empati).
src/data/tests.ts:8.  **Kotak VIII (Integrasi Sosial):** Menunjukkan perasaan terlindungi, rasa aman, dan bagaimana Anda berbaur dengan norma sosial di masyarakat.

src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:  path: string | null;
src/App.tsx:  authInfo: {
src/App.tsx:    userId?: string;

src/App.tsx:    emailVerified?: boolean;
src/App.tsx:    isAnonymous?: boolean;
src/App.tsx:    tenantId?: string | null;

src/App.tsx:      providerId: string;
src/App.tsx:      displayName: string | null;

src/App.tsx:function handleFirestoreError(error: unknown, operationType: OperationType, path: string | null) {
src/App.tsx:  const errInfo: FirestoreErrorInfo = {
src/App.tsx:    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
src/App.tsx:    authInfo: {
src/App.tsx:      userId: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/App.tsx:      email: auth.currentUser?.email,
src/App.tsx:      emailVerified: auth.currentUser?.emailVerified,
src/App.tsx:      isAnonymous: auth.currentUser?.isAnonymous,
src/App.tsx:      tenantId: auth.currentUser?.tenantId,
src/App.tsx:      providerInfo: auth.currentUser?.providerData.map(provider => ({
src/App.tsx:        providerId: provider.providerId,
src/App.tsx:        displayName: provider.displayName,
src/App.tsx:        email: provider.email,
src/App.tsx:        photoUrl: provider.photoURL
src/App.tsx:      })) || []
src/App.tsx:    },
src/App.tsx:    operationType,
src/App.tsx:    path
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:  // console.error('Firestore Error: ', JSON.stringify(errInfo)); // Removed to reduce console noise
src/App.tsx:  throw new Error(JSON.stringify(errInfo));
src/App.tsx:}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const Toast = ({ message, type, onClose }: { message: string, type: 'success' | 'error' | 'info', onClose: () => void }) => {
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const timer = setTimeout(onClose, 3000);
src/App.tsx:    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
src/App.tsx:  }, [onClose]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <motion.div 
src/App.tsx:      initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 50 }}
src/App.tsx:      animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
src/App.tsx:      exit={{ opacity: 0, y: 50 }}
src/App.tsx:      className={cn(
src/App.tsx:        "fixed bottom-6 right-6 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl shadow-lg z-[100] flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium",
src/App.tsx:        type === 'success' ? "bg-emerald-600 text-white" : 
src/App.tsx:        type === 'error' ? "bg-red-600 text-white" : "bg-emerald-600 text-white"
src/App.tsx:      )}
src/App.tsx:    >
src/App.tsx:      {type === 'success' && <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4" />}
src/App.tsx:      {type === 'error' && <X className="w-4 h-4" />}

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:const WarteggCanvas = ({ index, onSave, initialData }: { index: number, onSave: (data: string) => void, initialData?: string }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const canvasRef = React.useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
src/App.tsx:  const [isDrawing, setIsDrawing] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [history, setHistory] = useState<string[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const drawStimulus = (ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D) => {
src/App.tsx:    ctx.strokeStyle = '#000';
src/App.tsx:    ctx.lineWidth = 3;
src/App.tsx:    ctx.lineCap = 'round';
src/App.tsx:    ctx.setLineDash([]);
src/App.tsx:    ctx.fillStyle = '#000';
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    switch (index) {
src/App.tsx:      case 0: // Point in center
src/App.tsx:        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(150, 150, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
src/App.tsx:        break;
src/App.tsx:      case 1: // Curved line
src/App.tsx:        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(60, 60); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(90, 30, 120, 60); ctx.stroke();
src/App.tsx:        break;
src/App.tsx:      case 2: // Three vertical lines
src/App.tsx:        ctx.beginPath();
src/App.tsx:        ctx.moveTo(210, 240); ctx.lineTo(210, 210);
src/App.tsx:        ctx.moveTo(225, 240); ctx.lineTo(225, 195);
src/App.tsx:        ctx.moveTo(240, 240); ctx.lineTo(240, 180);
src/App.tsx:        ctx.stroke();
src/App.tsx:        break;
src/App.tsx:      case 3: // Small black square
src/App.tsx:        ctx.fillRect(240, 60, 15, 15);
src/App.tsx:        break;
src/App.tsx:      case 4: // Two slanting lines
src/App.tsx:        ctx.beginPath();
src/App.tsx:        ctx.moveTo(60, 210); ctx.lineTo(90, 240);
src/App.tsx:        ctx.moveTo(60, 240); ctx.lineTo(90, 210);
src/App.tsx:        ctx.stroke();
src/App.tsx:        break;
src/App.tsx:      case 5: // Horizontal and vertical lines
src/App.tsx:        ctx.beginPath();
src/App.tsx:        ctx.moveTo(150, 60); ctx.lineTo(150, 120);
src/App.tsx:        ctx.moveTo(180, 90); ctx.lineTo(240, 90);
src/App.tsx:        ctx.stroke();
src/App.tsx:        break;
src/App.tsx:      case 6: // Dotted curve
src/App.tsx:        ctx.setLineDash([3, 6]); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(240, 210, 30, Math.PI, Math.PI * 1.5); ctx.stroke(); ctx.setLineDash([]);
src/App.tsx:        break;
src/App.tsx:      case 7: // Large curve
src/App.tsx:        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(150, 240, 60, Math.PI, 0); ctx.stroke();
src/App.tsx:        break;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
src/App.tsx:    if (!canvas) return;
src/App.tsx:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/App.tsx:    if (!ctx) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    canvas.width = 300;
src/App.tsx:    canvas.height = 300;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (initialData) {
src/App.tsx:      const img = new Image();
src/App.tsx:      img.onload = () => ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
src/App.tsx:      img.src = initialData;
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      drawStimulus(ctx);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }, [index, initialData]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const saveToHistory = () => {
src/App.tsx:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
src/App.tsx:    if (canvas) {
src/App.tsx:      const data = canvas.toDataURL();
src/App.tsx:      setHistory(prev => [...prev, data]);
src/App.tsx:      onSave(data);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const startDrawing = (e: React.MouseEvent | React.TouchEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:    setIsDrawing(true);
src/App.tsx:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
src/App.tsx:    if (!canvas) return;
src/App.tsx:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/App.tsx:    if (!ctx) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
src/App.tsx:    const x = (('touches' in e) ? e.touches[0].clientX : (e as React.MouseEvent).clientX) - rect.left;
src/App.tsx:    const y = (('touches' in e) ? e.touches[0].clientY : (e as React.MouseEvent).clientY) - rect.top;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    ctx.beginPath();
src/App.tsx:    ctx.moveTo(x, y);
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Save state before drawing
src/App.tsx:    const data = canvas.toDataURL();
src/App.tsx:    if (history.length === 0 || history[history.length - 1] !== data) {
src/App.tsx:      setHistory(prev => [...prev, data]);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const draw = (e: React.MouseEvent | React.TouchEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!isDrawing) return;
src/App.tsx:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
src/App.tsx:    if (!canvas) return;
src/App.tsx:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/App.tsx:    if (!ctx) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
src/App.tsx:    const x = (('touches' in e) ? e.touches[0].clientX : (e as React.MouseEvent).clientX) - rect.left;
src/App.tsx:    const y = (('touches' in e) ? e.touches[0].clientY : (e as React.MouseEvent).clientY) - rect.top;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    ctx.lineTo(x, y);
src/App.tsx:    ctx.stroke();
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const stopDrawing = () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (isDrawing) {
src/App.tsx:      setIsDrawing(false);
src/App.tsx:      saveToHistory();
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const undo = () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (history.length === 0) return;
src/App.tsx:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
src/App.tsx:    if (!canvas) return;
src/App.tsx:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/App.tsx:    if (!ctx) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const newHistory = [...history];
src/App.tsx:    const lastState = newHistory.pop();
src/App.tsx:    setHistory(newHistory);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (lastState) {
src/App.tsx:      const img = new Image();
src/App.tsx:      img.onload = () => {
src/App.tsx:        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
src/App.tsx:        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
src/App.tsx:        onSave(canvas.toDataURL());
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:      img.src = lastState;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const clear = () => {
src/App.tsx:    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
src/App.tsx:    if (!canvas) return;
src/App.tsx:    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/App.tsx:    if (!ctx) return;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Save current to history before clearing
src/App.tsx:    setHistory(prev => [...prev, canvas.toDataURL()]);
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
src/App.tsx:    drawStimulus(ctx);
src/App.tsx:    onSave('');
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="relative bg-white p-2 rounded-2xl shadow-xl border-4 border-slate-100 group">
src/App.tsx:        <canvas
src/App.tsx:          ref={canvasRef}
src/App.tsx:          onMouseDown={startDrawing}
src/App.tsx:          onMouseMove={draw}
src/App.tsx:          onMouseUp={stopDrawing}
src/App.tsx:          onMouseLeave={stopDrawing}
src/App.tsx:          onTouchStart={startDrawing}
src/App.tsx:          onTouchMove={draw}
src/App.tsx:          onTouchEnd={stopDrawing}
src/App.tsx:          className="bg-white cursor-crosshair touch-none rounded-lg"
src/App.tsx:          style={{ width: '100%', maxWidth: '400px', aspectRatio: '1/1' }}
src/App.tsx:        />
src/App.tsx:        <div className="absolute top-4 right-4 flex flex-col gap-2">
src/App.tsx:          <button 
src/App.tsx:            onClick={undo} 
src/App.tsx:            disabled={history.length === 0}
src/App.tsx:            className="p-3 bg-white/90 rounded-xl shadow-lg text-slate-600 hover:text-emerald-600 disabled:opacity-50 transition-all border border-slate-100"
src/App.tsx:            title="Urungkan (Undo)"
src/App.tsx:          >
src/App.tsx:            <Undo2 className="w-5 h-5" />
src/App.tsx:          </button>
src/App.tsx:          <button 
src/App.tsx:            onClick={clear} 
src/App.tsx:            className="p-3 bg-white/90 rounded-xl shadow-lg text-slate-600 hover:text-red-500 transition-all border border-slate-100"
src/App.tsx:            title="Bersihkan (Clear)"
src/App.tsx:          >
src/App.tsx:            <Eraser className="w-5 h-5" />
src/App.tsx:          </button>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="absolute bottom-4 left-4 bg-slate-900/80 text-white text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full font-black tracking-widest uppercase">
src/App.tsx:          Kotak {index + 1}
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:    </div>
src/App.tsx:  );

src/App.tsx:const TestForm = ({ type, userId, customTest, onComplete, onCancel, isAnalyzingTest }: { type: TestType, userId: string, customTest?: any, onComplete: (scores: Record<string, number>, extraData?: any) => void, onCancel: () => void, isAnalyzingTest?: boolean }) => {
src/App.tsx:  const test = customTest || TESTS[type];
src/App.tsx:  const [currentIdx, setCurrentIdx] = useState(0);
src/App.tsx:  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
src/App.tsx:  const [scores, setScores] = useState<Record<string, number>>({});
src/App.tsx:  const [history, setHistory] = useState<{questionId: string, value: string, score: number}[]>([]);
src/App.tsx:  const [showResumeModal, setShowResumeModal] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:  const [pendingProgress, setPendingProgress] = useState<any>(null);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    // Check for standard test progress
src/App.tsx:    if (type !== 'wartegg' && type !== 'subject_interest') {
src/App.tsx:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(getProgressKey(userId, type));
src/App.tsx:      if (saved) {
src/App.tsx:        try {
src/App.tsx:          const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
src/App.tsx:          if (parsed.currentIdx > 0 || Object.keys(parsed.answers || {}).length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:            setPendingProgress(parsed);
src/App.tsx:            setShowResumeModal(true);
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:          console.error("Error parsing saved progress:", e);
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }, [userId, type]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (type !== 'wartegg' && type !== 'subject_interest') {
src/App.tsx:      if (currentIdx > 0 || Object.keys(answers).length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:        localStorage.setItem(getProgressKey(userId, type), JSON.stringify({
src/App.tsx:          currentIdx,
src/App.tsx:          answers,
src/App.tsx:          scores,
src/App.tsx:          history,
src/App.tsx:          timestamp: Date.now()
src/App.tsx:        }));
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }, [currentIdx, answers, scores, history, userId, type]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleResume = () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (pendingProgress) {
src/App.tsx:      setCurrentIdx(pendingProgress.currentIdx || 0);
src/App.tsx:      setAnswers(pendingProgress.answers || {});
src/App.tsx:      setScores(pendingProgress.scores || {});
src/App.tsx:      setHistory(pendingProgress.history || []);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    setShowResumeModal(false);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleStartFresh = () => {
src/App.tsx:    localStorage.removeItem(getProgressKey(userId, type));
src/App.tsx:    setCurrentIdx(0);
src/App.tsx:    setAnswers({});
src/App.tsx:    setScores({});
src/App.tsx:    setHistory([]);
src/App.tsx:    setShowResumeModal(false);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleAnswer = (questionId: string, value: string, score: number = 1) => {
src/App.tsx:    setAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [questionId]: value }));
src/App.tsx:    const newScores = { ...scores, [value]: (scores[value] || 0) + score };
src/App.tsx:    setScores(newScores);
src/App.tsx:    setHistory(prev => [...prev, { questionId, value, score }]);
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    if (currentIdx < test.questions.length - 1) {
src/App.tsx:      setCurrentIdx(currentIdx + 1);
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      onComplete(newScores);
src/App.tsx:      localStorage.removeItem(getProgressKey(userId, type));
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleBack = () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (currentIdx > 0) {
src/App.tsx:      const lastAnswer = history[history.length - 1];
src/App.tsx:      setScores(prev => ({ ...prev, [lastAnswer.value]: prev[lastAnswer.value] - lastAnswer.score }));
src/App.tsx:      setHistory(prev => prev.slice(0, -1));
src/App.tsx:      setCurrentIdx(currentIdx - 1);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const progress = ((currentIdx + 1) / test.questions.length) * 100;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  if (isAnalyzingTest) {
src/App.tsx:    return (
src/App.tsx:      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 min-h-[400px]">
src/App.tsx:        <motion.div animate={{ rotate: 360 }} transition={{ repeat: Infinity, duration: 2, ease: "linear" }} className="mb-6">
src/App.tsx:          <Brain className="w-16 h-16 text-emerald-500" />
src/App.tsx:        </motion.div>
src/App.tsx:        <h3 className="text-xl font-black text-slate-900 mb-2 text-center">Menganalisis Hasil Tes...</h3>
src/App.tsx:        <p className="text-slate-500 text-center max-w-sm">
src/App.tsx:          AI sedang memproses jawaban Anda untuk memberikan rekomendasi yang dipersonalisasi. Mohon tunggu sebentar.
src/App.tsx:        </p>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:    );
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const colors = [
src/App.tsx:    'bg-emerald-500/20', 'bg-blue-500/20', 'bg-amber-500/20', 'bg-rose-500/20',

src/App.tsx:  ];
src/App.tsx:  const color = colors[Object.keys(TESTS).indexOf(type) % colors.length];
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto py-6 px-4">
src/App.tsx:      <button onClick={onCancel} className="flex items-center text-emerald-600 border border-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-50 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl mb-6 text-sm font-bold transition-colors w-fit">
src/App.tsx:        <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" /> Kembali
src/App.tsx:      </button>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      {showResumeModal && (
src/App.tsx:        <ResumeTestModal 
src/App.tsx:          testType={type}
src/App.tsx:          onResume={handleResume}
src/App.tsx:          onStartFresh={handleStartFresh}
src/App.tsx:          onCancel={onCancel}
src/App.tsx:        />
src/App.tsx:      )}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      {/* Progress Indicator */}
src/App.tsx:      <div className={`mb-6 p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-sm flex items-center gap-4 ${color}`}>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="relative w-12 h-12 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
src/App.tsx:          <svg className="w-full h-full transform -rotate-90" viewBox="0 0 36 36">
src/App.tsx:            <path
src/App.tsx:              className="text-black/10"

src/App.tsx:              stroke="currentColor"

src/App.tsx:              d="M18 2.0845 a 15.9155 15.9155 0 0 1 0 31.831 a 15.9155 15.9155 0 0 1 0 -31.831"

src/App.tsx:${Object.entries(result.extraData.titles || {}).sort(([a], [b]) => parseInt(a) - parseInt(b)).map(([k, v]) => `- Kotak ${parseInt(k) + 1}: ${v}`).join('\n')}

src/App.tsx:2. **Area Pengembangan**: Identifikasi aspek emosional atau perilaku yang perlu perhatian.

src/App.tsx:  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);
src/App.tsx:  const itemsPerPage = 10;
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const registeredClassNames = classes.map(c => c.name);
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const guestUsers = users.filter(u => u.role === 'student' && !registeredClassNames.includes(u.className));
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const filteredGuests = guestUsers.filter(g => 
src/App.tsx:    (g.name && g.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())) ||
src/App.tsx:    (g.className && g.className.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())) ||
src/App.tsx:    (g.nisn && g.nisn.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()))
src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const toggleSelectAll = () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (selectedGuestIds.length === filteredGuests.length) {
src/App.tsx:      setSelectedGuestIds([]);
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      setSelectedGuestIds(filteredGuests.map(g => g.uid || ''));
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const toggleSelect = (id: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (selectedGuestIds.includes(id)) {
src/App.tsx:      setSelectedGuestIds(selectedGuestIds.filter(i => i !== id));
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      setSelectedGuestIds([...selectedGuestIds, id]);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-6">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4 bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm">

src/App.tsx:  setConfirmDelete: (data: any) => void

src/App.tsx:  const [selectedClass, setSelectedClass] = useState<string>('all');
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedSchool, setSelectedSchool] = useState<string>('all');
src/App.tsx:  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState<string>('all');
src/App.tsx:  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);
src/App.tsx:  const itemsPerPage = 10;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

src/App.tsx:  }, [selectedClass, selectedSchool, search, statusFilter]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Pre-group results by student for O(1) lookup
src/App.tsx:  const resultsByStudent = React.useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const map: Record<string, TestResult[]> = {};
src/App.tsx:    results.forEach(r => {
src/App.tsx:      // Logic from filters: r.studentId === s.id || (r.studentName === s.name && r.studentClass === s.className)
src/App.tsx:      // We can create multiple keys in our lookup map to handle different matches
src/App.tsx:      if (r.studentId) {
src/App.tsx:        if (!map[r.studentId]) map[r.studentId] = [];
src/App.tsx:        map[r.studentId].push(r);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const nameClassKey = `${r.studentName}_${r.studentClass}`;
src/App.tsx:      if (!map[nameClassKey]) map[nameClassKey] = [];
src/App.tsx:      map[nameClassKey].push(r);
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    return map;
src/App.tsx:  }, [results]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const filteredStudents = React.useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    return students.filter(s => {
src/App.tsx:      const matchesClass = selectedClass === 'all' || s.className === selectedClass;
src/App.tsx:      const matchesSchool = selectedSchool === 'all' || (s.schoolName && s.schoolName.toLowerCase() === selectedSchool.toLowerCase());
src/App.tsx:      const matchesSearch = s.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || 
src/App.tsx:                           (s.nisn && s.nisn.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()));

src/App.tsx:      // Fast lookup instead of results.filter inside map
src/App.tsx:      const studentResults = resultsByStudent[s.id!] || resultsByStudent[`${s.name}_${s.className}`] || [];
src/App.tsx:      const hasTakenTest = studentResults.length > 0;
src/App.tsx:      const matchesStatus = statusFilter === 'all' || (statusFilter === 'belum_tes' && !hasTakenTest);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      return matchesClass && matchesSchool && matchesSearch && matchesStatus;
src/App.tsx:    }).sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:      const classCompare = (a.className || '').localeCompare(b.className || '', undefined, { numeric: true });
src/App.tsx:      if (classCompare !== 0) return classCompare;
src/App.tsx:      return (parseInt(a.number) || 0) - (parseInt(b.number) || 0);
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:  }, [students, resultsByStudent, selectedClass, selectedSchool, search, statusFilter]);

src/App.tsx:  classes: ClassInfo[],

src/App.tsx:  teacherSettings: TeacherSettings | null,

src/App.tsx:  setSelectedGuestIds: (ids: string[]) => void,
src/App.tsx:  setConfirmDelete: (data: any) => void
src/App.tsx:}) => {
src/App.tsx:  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedSchool, setSelectedSchool] = useState<string>('all');
src/App.tsx:  const [selectedClass, setSelectedClass] = useState<string>('all');
src/App.tsx:  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);
src/App.tsx:  const itemsPerPage = 10;
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    setCurrentPage(1);
src/App.tsx:  }, [search, selectedSchool, selectedClass]);
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const registeredClassNames = classes.map(c => c.name);
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const allGuestUsers = users.filter(u => u.role === 'student' && !registeredClassNames.includes(u.className))
src/App.tsx:    .map(guest => {
src/App.tsx:      const hasTests = results.some(r => r.studentId === guest.uid || (r.studentName === guest.name && r.studentClass === guest.className));
src/App.tsx:      return { ...guest, hasTests };
src/App.tsx:    })
src/App.tsx:    .filter(g => g.hasTests);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const uniqueSchools = [...new Set(allGuestUsers.map(g => g.schoolName).filter(Boolean))].sort();
src/App.tsx:  const uniqueClasses = [...new Set(allGuestUsers.map(g => g.className).filter(Boolean))].sort();
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const filteredUsers = allGuestUsers
src/App.tsx:    .filter(g => (selectedSchool === 'all' || g.schoolName === selectedSchool))
src/App.tsx:    .filter(g => (selectedClass === 'all' || g.className === selectedClass))
src/App.tsx:    .filter(g => g.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()))
src/App.tsx:    .sort((a, b) => (a.name || '').localeCompare(b.name || ''));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const toggleSelectAll = () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (selectedGuestIds.length === filteredUsers.length) {
src/App.tsx:      setSelectedGuestIds([]);
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      setSelectedGuestIds(filteredUsers.map(g => g.uid || ''));
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const toggleSelect = (id: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (selectedGuestIds.includes(id)) {
src/App.tsx:      setSelectedGuestIds(selectedGuestIds.filter(i => i !== id));
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      setSelectedGuestIds([...selectedGuestIds, id]);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="space-y-6">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4 bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm">
src/App.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
src/App.tsx:          <button 
src/App.tsx:            onClick={() => setConfirmDelete({
src/App.tsx:              id: 'all_guests_report',
src/App.tsx:              type: 'all_guests_comprehensive',

src/App.tsx:const PaginationControls = ({ currentPage, totalPages, onPageChange, totalItems, itemsPerPage }: { 
src/App.tsx:  currentPage: number, 
src/App.tsx:  totalPages: number, 
src/App.tsx:  onPageChange: (page: number) => void,
src/App.tsx:  totalItems: number,
src/App.tsx:  itemsPerPage: number
src/App.tsx:}) => {
src/App.tsx:  if (totalPages <= 1) return null;
src/App.tsx:  
src/App.tsx:  const startItem = (currentPage - 1) * itemsPerPage + 1;
src/App.tsx:  const endItem = Math.min(currentPage * itemsPerPage, totalItems);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center p-4 border-t border-slate-100 bg-slate-50/50 gap-4">
src/App.tsx:      <div className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500">
src/App.tsx:        Menampilkan <span className="text-slate-900">{startItem}-{endItem}</span> dari <span className="text-slate-900">{totalItems}</span> data
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
src/App.tsx:        <button 
src/App.tsx:          disabled={currentPage === 1}
src/App.tsx:          onClick={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); onPageChange(currentPage - 1); }}
src/App.tsx:          className="flex items-center gap-1 h-9 px-3 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"
src/App.tsx:        >
src/App.tsx:          <ChevronLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> SEBELUMNYA
src/App.tsx:        </button>
src/App.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-1">
src/App.tsx:          {Array.from({ length: Math.min(10, totalPages) }, (_, i) => {
src/App.tsx:            let pageNum = i + 1;
src/App.tsx:            if (totalPages > 10 && currentPage > 5) {
src/App.tsx:              pageNum = currentPage - 4 + i;
src/App.tsx:              if (pageNum + 5 > totalPages) pageNum = totalPages - 9 + i;
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:            return (
src/App.tsx:              <button
src/App.tsx:                key={pageNum}
src/App.tsx:                onClick={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); onPageChange(pageNum); }}
src/App.tsx:                className={cn(
src/App.tsx:                  "w-7 h-7 flex items-center justify-center rounded text-xs font-black transition-all",
src/App.tsx:                  currentPage === pageNum ? "bg-emerald-600 text-white shadow-md shadow-emerald-200" : "text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50"
src/App.tsx:                )}
src/App.tsx:              >
src/App.tsx:                {pageNum}
src/App.tsx:              </button>
src/App.tsx:            );
src/App.tsx:          })}
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:        <button 
src/App.tsx:          disabled={currentPage === totalPages}
src/App.tsx:          onClick={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); onPageChange(currentPage + 1); }}
src/App.tsx:          className="flex items-center gap-1 h-9 px-3 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"

src/App.tsx:  const registeredClassNames = React.useMemo(() => classes.map(c => c.name), [classes]);
src/App.tsx:  const filteredRiwayatTamuResults = React.useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    return results
src/App.tsx:      .filter(r => !registeredClassNames.includes(r.studentClass))
src/App.tsx:      .filter(r => {
src/App.tsx:        const matchesName = r.studentName.toLowerCase().includes(tamuSearch.toLowerCase());
src/App.tsx:        const matchesType = tamuTypeFilter === 'all' || r.testType === tamuTypeFilter;
src/App.tsx:        const matchesDate = !tamuDate || (r.timestamp?.seconds && new Date(r.timestamp.seconds * 1000).toLocaleDateString() === new Date(tamuDate).toLocaleDateString());
src/App.tsx:        return matchesName && matchesType && matchesDate;
src/App.tsx:      })
src/App.tsx:      .sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:        let cmp = 0;
src/App.tsx:        if (tamuSortField === 'school') {
src/App.tsx:          const schoolA = a.studentSchoolName || '';
src/App.tsx:          const schoolB = b.studentSchoolName || '';
src/App.tsx:          cmp = schoolA.localeCompare(schoolB, undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' });
src/App.tsx:        } else if (tamuSortField === 'name') {
src/App.tsx:          cmp = (a.studentName || '').localeCompare(b.studentName || '', undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' });
src/App.tsx:        } else if (tamuSortField === 'type') {
src/App.tsx:          cmp = (TESTS[a.testType]?.title || '').localeCompare(TESTS[b.testType]?.title || '', undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' });
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          // Default to date
src/App.tsx:          const timeA = a.timestamp?.seconds || 0;
src/App.tsx:          const timeB = b.timestamp?.seconds || 0;
src/App.tsx:          cmp = timeA - timeB;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        if (cmp !== 0) {
src/App.tsx:          return tamuSortOrder === 'asc' ? cmp : -cmp;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Secondary sort: default to date desc if primary equal
src/App.tsx:        return (b.timestamp?.seconds || 0) - (a.timestamp?.seconds || 0);
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:  }, [results, registeredClassNames, tamuSearch, tamuTypeFilter, tamuDate, tamuSortField, tamuSortOrder]);

src/App.tsx:  const classAverages = React.useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (filterType === 'all') return null;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const relevantResults = filteredResults.filter(r => r.testType === filterType);
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const classGroups: Record<string, { totalScores: Record<string, number>, count: number }> = {};
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    relevantResults.forEach(r => {
src/App.tsx:      if (!classGroups[r.studentClass]) {
src/App.tsx:        classGroups[r.studentClass] = { totalScores: {}, count: 0 };
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      Object.entries(r.scores).forEach(([scoreName, scoreValue]) => {
src/App.tsx:        classGroups[r.studentClass].totalScores[scoreName] = (classGroups[r.studentClass].totalScores[scoreName] || 0) + (scoreValue as number);
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      classGroups[r.studentClass].count++;
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    return Object.entries(classGroups).map(([className, data]) => ({
src/App.tsx:      className,
src/App.tsx:      averages: Object.fromEntries(
src/App.tsx:        Object.entries(data.totalScores).map(([scoreName, total]) => [scoreName, total / data.count])
src/App.tsx:      )
src/App.tsx:    }));
src/App.tsx:  }, [filteredResults, filterType]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const classChartData = React.useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (filterType === 'all') return [];
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const relevantResults = filteredResults.filter(r => r.testType === filterType);
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const totalScores: Record<string, number> = {};
src/App.tsx:    relevantResults.forEach(r => {
src/App.tsx:      Object.entries(r.scores).forEach(([name, val]) => {
src/App.tsx:        totalScores[name] = (totalScores[name] || 0) + (val as number);
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    const count = relevantResults.length || 1;
src/App.tsx:    return Object.entries(totalScores).map(([name, val]) => ({
src/App.tsx:      name: name.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + name.slice(1).replace('_', ' '),
src/App.tsx:      value: (val as number) / count
src/App.tsx:    }));
src/App.tsx:  }, [filteredResults, filterType]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const tableFilteredResults = React.useMemo(() => {
src/App.tsx:    return results
src/App.tsx:      .filter(r => {
src/App.tsx:        // Only registered students
src/App.tsx:        if (!registeredClassNames.includes(r.studentClass)) return false;
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        const matchesClass = tableClassFilter === 'all' || r.studentClass === tableClassFilter;
src/App.tsx:        const matchesName = r.studentName.toLowerCase().includes(historySearch.toLowerCase());
src/App.tsx:        const matchesType = tableTypeFilter === 'all' || r.testType === tableTypeFilter;
src/App.tsx:        const matchesDate = !historyDate || new Date(r.timestamp?.seconds * 1000).toLocaleDateString() === new Date(historyDate).toLocaleDateString();
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        return matchesClass && matchesName && matchesType && matchesDate;
src/App.tsx:      })
src/App.tsx:      .sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:        let cmp = 0;
src/App.tsx:        if (historySortField === 'school') {
src/App.tsx:          const schoolA = a.studentSchoolName || students.find(s => s.id === a.studentId || (s.name === a.studentName && s.className === a.studentClass))?.schoolName || '';
src/App.tsx:          const schoolB = b.studentSchoolName || students.find(s => s.id === b.studentId || (s.name === b.studentName && s.className === b.studentClass))?.schoolName || '';
src/App.tsx:          cmp = schoolA.localeCompare(schoolB, undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' });
src/App.tsx:        } else if (historySortField === 'name') {
src/App.tsx:          cmp = (a.studentName || '').localeCompare(b.studentName || '', undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' });
src/App.tsx:        } else if (historySortField === 'class') {
src/App.tsx:          cmp = (a.studentClass || '').localeCompare(b.studentClass || '', undefined, { numeric: true, sensitivity: 'base' });
src/App.tsx:        } else if (historySortField === 'type') {
src/App.tsx:          cmp = (TESTS[a.testType]?.title || '').localeCompare(TESTS[b.testType]?.title || '', undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' });
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          // Default to date
src/App.tsx:          const timeA = a.timestamp?.seconds || 0;
src/App.tsx:          const timeB = b.timestamp?.seconds || 0;
src/App.tsx:          cmp = timeA - timeB;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        if (cmp !== 0) {
src/App.tsx:          return historySortOrder === 'asc' ? cmp : -cmp;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Secondary sort: default to date desc if primary equal
src/App.tsx:        return (b.timestamp?.seconds || 0) - (a.timestamp?.seconds || 0);
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:  }, [results, registeredClassNames, tableClassFilter, historySearch, tableTypeFilter, historyDate, historySortField, historySortOrder, students]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const totalPages = Math.ceil(tableFilteredResults.length / itemsPerPage);
src/App.tsx:  const paginatedResults = tableFilteredResults.slice((currentPage - 1) * itemsPerPage, currentPage * itemsPerPage);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const toggleSelectHistory = (id: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    setSelectedHistoryIds(prev => 
src/App.tsx:      prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(item => item !== id) : [...prev, id]
src/App.tsx:    );
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const toggleHistorySort = (field: 'name' | 'class' | 'school' | 'type' | 'date') => {
src/App.tsx:    if (historySortField === field) {
src/App.tsx:      setHistorySortOrder(historySortOrder === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc');
src/App.tsx:    } else {
src/App.tsx:      setHistorySortField(field);
src/App.tsx:      setHistorySortOrder('asc');
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:      setTamuSortOrder(tamuSortOrder === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc');
src/App.tsx:    } else {

src/App.tsx:      setTamuSortOrder('asc');
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:

src/App.tsx:      setSelectedHistoryIds([]);

src/App.tsx:  const handleUploadStudents = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
src/App.tsx:    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
src/App.tsx:    if (!file) return;

src/App.tsx:    // Reset state
src/App.tsx:    setImportErrors([]);
src/App.tsx:    setUploadSummary(null);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const reader = new FileReader();
src/App.tsx:    reader.onload = async (event) => {
src/App.tsx:      try {
src/App.tsx:        const data = new Uint8Array(event.target?.result as ArrayBuffer);
src/App.tsx:        const workbook = XLSX.read(data, { type: 'array' });
src/App.tsx:        const sheetName = workbook.SheetNames[0];
src/App.tsx:        const worksheet = workbook.Sheets[sheetName];
src/App.tsx:        const jsonData = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(worksheet) as any[];
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        if (jsonData.length === 0) {
src/App.tsx:          showToast("File Excel kosong atau tidak terbaca.", "error");
src/App.tsx:          return;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        let successCount = 0;
src/App.tsx:        const newIds: string[] = [];
src/App.tsx:        const errors: string[] = [];
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        for (let i = 0; i < jsonData.length; i++) {
src/App.tsx:          const row = jsonData[i];
src/App.tsx:          const rowNum = i + 2; // +1 for 0-index, +1 for header row
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          // Helper to find value by normalized key
src/App.tsx:          const findValue = (searchKeys: string[]) => {
src/App.tsx:            const lowerSearchKeys = searchKeys.map(k => k.toLowerCase());
src/App.tsx:            const actualKey = Object.keys(row).find(k => lowerSearchKeys.includes(k.trim().toLowerCase()));
src/App.tsx:            return actualKey ? row[actualKey] : null;
src/App.tsx:          };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          const number = findValue(["No", "Nomor"]) || "";
src/App.tsx:          const nisn = findValue(["NISN"]) ? String(findValue(["NISN"])).trim() : "";
src/App.tsx:          const name = findValue(["Nama Siswa", "Nama", "Student Name"]);
src/App.tsx:          const className = findValue(["Kelas", "Class"]);
src/App.tsx:          const schoolName = findValue(["Nama Sekolah", "Sekolah", "Asal Sekolah", "School Name"]) || teacherSettings?.schoolName || "";
src/App.tsx:          
src/App.tsx:          // Validation
src/App.tsx:          if (!name || (!String(name).trim())) {
src/App.tsx:            errors.push(`Baris ${rowNum}: Nama Siswa kosong.`);
src/App.tsx:            continue;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:          if (!className || (!String(className).trim())) {
src/App.tsx:            errors.push(`Baris ${rowNum}: Kelas kosong.`);
src/App.tsx:            continue;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          if (nisn) {
src/App.tsx:            if (!/^\d+$/.test(nisn)) {
src/App.tsx:              errors.push(`Baris ${rowNum}: NISN (${nisn}) harus berupa angka.`);
src/App.tsx:              continue;
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:            if (students.some(s => s.nisn === nisn)) {
src/App.tsx:              errors.push(`Baris ${rowNum}: NISN (${nisn}) sudah terdaftar di sistem.`);
src/App.tsx:              continue;
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:          try {
src/App.tsx:            const docRef = await addDoc(collection(db, 'students'), {
src/App.tsx:              number: String(number),
src/App.tsx:              nisn: nisn,
src/App.tsx:              name: String(name).trim(),
src/App.tsx:              className: String(className).trim().toUpperCase(),
src/App.tsx:              schoolName: String(schoolName).trim(),
src/App.tsx:              addedBy: user.uid,
src/App.tsx:              createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:            });
src/App.tsx:            newIds.push(docRef.id);
src/App.tsx:            successCount++;
src/App.tsx:          } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:            console.error("Error uploading student row:", error);
src/App.tsx:            errors.push(`Baris ${rowNum}: Gagal menyimpan ke database.`);
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        setRecentlyAddedIds(newIds);
src/App.tsx:        setUploadSummary({ total: jsonData.length, success: successCount });
src/App.tsx:        setImportErrors(errors);
src/App.tsx:        setActiveTab('students');
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        if (successCount > 0) {
src/App.tsx:          showToast(`Berhasil mengimpor ${successCount} siswa.`, "success");
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        if (errors.length > 0) {
src/App.tsx:          showToast(`Terdapat ${errors.length} baris yang gagal diimpor.`, "error");
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Auto hide summary after 15 seconds if many errors, else 8s
src/App.tsx:        setTimeout(() => {
src/App.tsx:          setUploadSummary(null);
src/App.tsx:          setRecentlyAddedIds([]);
src/App.tsx:          setImportErrors([]);
src/App.tsx:        }, errors.length > 0 ? 15000 : 8000);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:        console.error("Error reading excel:", err);
src/App.tsx:        showToast("Gagal membaca file Excel. Pastikan format benar.", "error");
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:    reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
src/App.tsx:    // Reset input value to allow re-upload same file
src/App.tsx:    e.target.value = '';
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (type === 'subject_interest') {

src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:  const handleCompleteTest = async (scores: Record<string, number>, extraData?: any) => {

src/App.tsx:}).join('\n')}` : ''}

src/App.tsx:                  >
src/App.tsx:                    LANJUTKAN SEKARANG <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
src/App.tsx:                  </button>
src/App.tsx:                </motion.div>
src/App.tsx:              )}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:              {user.role === 'student' && customTests.filter(ct => ct.isActive && !userResults.some(ur => ur.testType === ct.testType)).length > 0 && (
src/App.tsx:                <motion.div 
src/App.tsx:                  initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
src/App.tsx:                  animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
src/App.tsx:                  className="mb-12 p-6 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-3xl flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-6 shadow-sm"

src/App.tsx:                  <div className="flex items-center gap-5">
src/App.tsx:                    <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-amber-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 shadow-inner">
src/App.tsx:                      <Bell className="w-7 h-7 text-amber-600" />
src/App.tsx:                    </div>
src/App.tsx:                    <div>
src/App.tsx:                      <h4 className="text-lg font-black text-amber-900">Tes Belum Selesai</h4>
src/App.tsx:                      <p className="text-amber-700 text-sm font-medium">Kamu memiliki {customTests.filter(ct => ct.isActive && !userResults.some(ur => ur.testType === ct.testType)).length} tes kustom yang belum dikerjakan.</p>
src/App.tsx:                    </div>
src/App.tsx:                  </div>
src/App.tsx:                  <button 
src/App.tsx:                    onClick={() => {
src/App.tsx:                      const firstUnfinished = customTests.find(ct => ct.isActive && !userResults.some(ur => ur.testType === ct.testType));
src/App.tsx:                      if (firstUnfinished) setActiveCustomTest(firstUnfinished);
src/App.tsx:                    }}
src/App.tsx:                    className="px-8 py-3 bg-amber-600 text-white rounded-2xl font-black text-sm hover:bg-amber-700 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-amber-200 shrink-0"
src/App.tsx:                  >
src/App.tsx:                    KERJAKAN SEKARANG
src/App.tsx:                  </button>
src/App.tsx:                </motion.div>
src/App.tsx:              )}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
src/App.tsx:                {(Object.keys(TESTS) as TestType[]).map(type => (
src/App.tsx:                  <TestCard 
src/App.tsx:                    key={type} 
src/App.tsx:                    type={type} 
src/App.tsx:                    test={TESTS[type]} 
src/App.tsx:                    onSelect={setActiveTest} 
src/App.tsx:                    onPreview={setShowPreview}
src/App.tsx:                    recommendation={getRecommendation(type)}
src/App.tsx:                    results={userResults.filter(r => r.testType === type)}
src/App.tsx:                  />
src/App.tsx:                ))}
src/App.tsx:                {customTests.filter(t => t.isActive).map(test => (
src/App.tsx:                  <TestCard 
src/App.tsx:                    key={test.id} 
src/App.tsx:                    type={test.testType} 
src/App.tsx:                    test={test} 
src/App.tsx:                    onSelect={() => setActiveCustomTest(test)} 
src/App.tsx:                    onPreview={setShowPreview}
src/App.tsx:                    recommendation={undefined}
src/App.tsx:                    results={userResults.filter(r => r.testType === test.testType)}
src/App.tsx:                  />
src/App.tsx:                ))}
src/App.tsx:              </div>
src/App.tsx:            </motion.div>
src/App.tsx:          )}
src/App.tsx:        </AnimatePresence>
src/App.tsx:      </main>
src/App.tsx:      <AnimatePresence>
src/App.tsx:        {showExitConfirm && (
src/App.tsx:          <ConfirmModal 
src/App.tsx:            title="Keluar Aplikasi"
src/App.tsx:            message="Anda yakin keluar dari aplikasi ini?"
src/App.tsx:            onCancel={() => setShowExitConfirm(false)}
src/App.tsx:            onConfirm={() => {
src/App.tsx:              setShowExitConfirm(false);
src/App.tsx:              handleLogout();
src/App.tsx:            }}
src/App.tsx:          />
src/App.tsx:        )}
src/App.tsx:        {showPreview && (
src/App.tsx:          <TestPreviewModal 
src/App.tsx:            type={showPreview}
src/App.tsx:            onClose={() => setShowPreview(null)}
src/App.tsx:            onStart={(type) => {
src/App.tsx:              setShowPreview(null);
src/App.tsx:              setActiveTest(type);
src/App.tsx:            }}
src/App.tsx:          />
src/App.tsx:        )}
src/App.tsx:      </AnimatePresence>
src/App.tsx:    </div>
src/App.tsx:  );

firestore.rules:rules_version = '2';
firestore.rules:service cloud.firestore {
firestore.rules:  match /databases/{database}/documents {
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:    // Assumed Data Model
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:    // Collection: users
firestore.rules:    // Document ID: uid
firestore.rules:    // Fields:
firestore.rules:    //   - uid: string (required)
firestore.rules:    //   - name: string (required)
firestore.rules:    //   - email: string (required)
firestore.rules:    //   - role: string (required, enum: student, teacher, admin)
firestore.rules:    //   - classId: string (optional)
firestore.rules:    //   - createdAt: timestamp (required)
firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // Collection: test_results
firestore.rules:    // Document ID: auto-generated
firestore.rules:    // Fields:
firestore.rules:    //   - studentId: string (required)
firestore.rules:    //   - studentName: string (required)
firestore.rules:    //   - testType: string (required, enum: learning_style, multiple_intelligences, personality, aptitude_interest, school_major, anxiety)
firestore.rules:    //   - scores: map (required)
firestore.rules:    //   - analysis: string (required)
firestore.rules:    //   - timestamp: timestamp (required)
firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // Collection: classes
firestore.rules:    // Document ID: auto-generated
firestore.rules:    // Fields:
firestore.rules:    //   - id: string (required)
firestore.rules:    //   - name: string (required)
firestore.rules:    //   - teacherId: string (required)
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // Helper Functions
firestore.rules:    function isAuthenticated() {
firestore.rules:      return request.auth != null;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isOwner(userId) {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && request.auth.uid == userId;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isAdmin() {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() &&
firestore.rules:        (get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data.role == 'admin' ||
firestore.rules:          (request.auth.token.get('email', '').lower() == "dutatama@gmail.com" && request.auth.token.get('email_verified', false) == true));
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isTeacher() {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && get(/databases/$(database)/documents/users/$(request.auth.uid)).data.role == 'teacher';
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidUser(data) {
firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['uid', 'name', 'email', 'role', 'createdAt']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.uid is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.name is string && data.name.size() > 0 && data.name.size() < 100 &&
firestore.rules:             data.email is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.role in ['student', 'teacher', 'admin'] &&
firestore.rules:             (data.createdAt is timestamp || data.createdAt == request.time);
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidTestResult(data) {
firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['studentId', 'studentName', 'testType', 'scores', 'analysis', 'timestamp', 'teacherId']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.studentId is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.teacherId is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.studentName is string && data.studentName.size() > 0 && data.studentName.size() < 100 &&
firestore.rules:             data.testType in ['learning_style', 'multiple_intelligences', 'personality', 'aptitude_interest', 'school_major', 'anxiety', 'wartegg'] &&
firestore.rules:             data.scores is map &&
firestore.rules:             data.analysis is string &&
firestore.rules:             (data.timestamp is timestamp || data.timestamp == request.time);
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidCounselingLog(data) {
firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['studentId', 'teacherId', 'date', 'topic', 'notes', 'interventionStatus', 'timestamp']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.studentId is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.teacherId is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.date is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.topic is string && data.topic.size() > 0 && data.topic.size() < 200 &&
firestore.rules:             data.notes is string && data.notes.size() > 0 && data.notes.size() < 5000 &&
firestore.rules:             data.interventionStatus in ['pending', 'in-progress', 'completed'] &&
firestore.rules:             (data.timestamp is timestamp || data.timestamp == request.time);
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isEmergencyUser(uid) {
firestore.rules:      return uid is string && uid.matches("^local_.*");
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isLegacyAdmin() {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && request.auth.token.get('email', '').lower() == "purnomowiwit@gmail.com";
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    match /users/{uid} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isOwner(uid) || isAdmin() || (isTeacher() && resource.data.teacherId == request.auth.uid);
firestore.rules:      allow create, update: if isEmergencyUser(uid) || isOwner(uid) || isAdmin();
firestore.rules:      allow delete: if isAdmin();
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:

firestore.rules:      allow delete: if isAdmin() || (isTeacher() && (resource.data.teacherId == request.auth.uid || (isLegacyAdmin() && resource.data.teacherId == 'admin')));
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:

firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:

firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:

firestore.rules:      allow write: if isOwner(uid) && (isAdmin() || isTeacher());
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:

firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:

firestore.rules:        (isTeacher() && (resource.data.teacherId == request.auth.uid || (isLegacyAdmin() && resource.data.teacherId == 'admin')))
firestore.rules:      ));
firestore.rules:      allow create: if true;

firestore.rules:        (request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId && request.resource.data.diff(resource.data).affectedKeys().hasOnly(['read'])) ||
firestore.rules:        isAdmin() || (isTeacher() && (resource.data.teacherId == request.auth.uid || (isLegacyAdmin() && resource.data.teacherId == 'admin')))
firestore.rules:      );

firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
